title: More Armor and Tools
body:
This mod adds more armor and tools. The different types include:
  
**Copper Armor & Tools** (Advanced Functionality)
  
**Lapis Lazuli Armor & Tools** (Advanced Functionality)
  
**Ender Armor & Tools** (Basic Functionality)
 
Definitions
 
*Basic Functionality*
adds the base layer and texture of the armor.

*Advanced Functionality*
adds damage values, durability values, and more.
